data.title: Annovis Bio Faces NYSE Non-Compliance Notice
data.description:
Annovis Bio ( (ANVS) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 26, 2025, Annovis Bio, Inc. received a notice from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) indicating non-compliance with the NYSE’s continued listing standards due to its average market capitalization and stockholders’ equity falling below $50 million. The company plans to submit a compliance plan within 45 days, which the NYSE will review to determine if Annovis can meet the standards within an 18-month period. The notice does not affect the company’s business operations or its reporting obligations, and its stock will continue to be traded with a ‘.BC’ designation until compliance is regained.

More about Annovis Bio

Headquartered in Malvern, Pennsylvania, Annovis Bio, Inc. is a late-stage clinical drug platform company focused on pioneering transformative therapies for neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer’s disease and Parkinson’s disease. The company targets multiple neurotoxic proteins to restore brain function and improve the quality of life for patients.

YTD Price Performance: -63.80%

Average Trading Volume: 510,712

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $36.05M

data.title: Dollar Tree Secures New Credit Agreements with JPMorgan
data.description:
Dollar Tree ( (DLTR) ) has provided an update.

On March 21, 2025, Dollar Tree, Inc. entered into two significant credit agreements with JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. The first is a $1,500 million revolving credit facility maturing in 2030, and the second is a $1,000 million 364-day revolving credit facility maturing in 2026. These agreements, which include various covenants and conditions, replace the company’s previous credit arrangement and are expected to enhance Dollar Tree’s financial flexibility. The agreements allow for voluntary repayment without penalties, supporting the company’s strategic financial management.

More about Dollar Tree

Dollar Tree, Inc. is a prominent player in the retail industry, primarily operating discount variety stores. The company focuses on offering a wide range of products at a fixed price point, catering to budget-conscious consumers.

data.title: Scotch Creek Ventures Updates Private Placement Pricing
data.description:
Scotch Creek Ventures, Inc. ( (TSE:SCV) ) has issued an announcement.

Scotch Creek Ventures Inc. has announced a pricing update for its private placement, adjusting the price per unit to $0.05 to raise up to $350,000. The funds will be used to address corporate debt and support working capital, potentially strengthening its financial position and operational capabilities in the competitive lithium exploration industry.

More about Scotch Creek Ventures, Inc.

Scotch Creek Ventures Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing lithium projects in North America, particularly in the Clayton Valley, Nevada. The company aims to establish itself as a leading lithium exploration entity in this promising mining district.

data.title: Rectitude Holdings Ltd Sees Revenue Growth Amid Rising Costs
data.description:
Rectitude Holdings Ltd ( (RECT) ) has issued an announcement.

Rectitude Holdings Ltd reported a 7.9% increase in total revenue for the six months ended September 30, 2024, compared to the same period in 2023, driven by a 21% rise in safety equipment sales. Despite a decrease in gross profit margin due to increased procurement costs, the company achieved a net income of approximately S$1.1 million. The revenue growth was primarily fueled by higher demand from the construction sector, while increased selling, marketing, and administrative expenses were noted due to expansion efforts and NASDAQ listing compliance costs.

More about Rectitude Holdings Ltd

Rectitude Holdings Ltd, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the safety equipment industry, providing products such as personal protective clothing, safety footwear, portable fire extinguishers, and traffic products. The company also offers auxiliary products like industrial hardware tools and electrical hardware for construction sites, with a significant focus on serving the construction sector.

data.title: Coca-Cola Streamlines Operations with Segment Reorganization
data.description:
An update from Coca-Cola ( (KO) ) is now available.

On January 1, 2025, Coca-Cola streamlined its operations by discontinuing its Global Ventures segment, integrating Costa, innocent, and doğadan into the Europe, Middle East, and Africa segment, while Costa’s ready-to-drink business and Monster-related fees were allocated to relevant geographic segments. This organizational change aims to simplify Coca-Cola’s structure without affecting previously reported financial results, potentially enhancing operational efficiency and focus.

More about Coca-Cola

Coca-Cola is a leading beverage company known for its flagship product, Coca-Cola, and a wide range of other non-alcoholic beverages. The company operates globally, focusing on regions such as Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Latin America, North America, and Asia Pacific. Coca-Cola’s portfolio includes brands like Costa, innocent, and doğadan, and it has strategic partnerships with companies like Monster Beverage Corporation.

data.title: Canadian Gold Corp. Secures $3 Million Financing with Strategic Investment from McEwen Mining
data.description:
Satori Resources ( (TSE:CGC) ) has provided an announcement.

Canadian Gold Corp. has successfully closed a $3 million financing round, with McEwen Mining Inc. acquiring a 5.9% strategic stake in the company. The funds will be used to explore and develop the Tartan Mine’s Main and South Zones, potentially enhancing the company’s gold resource base and advancing development studies, which could strengthen its position in the mining industry.

More about Satori Resources

Canadian Gold Corp. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration and development company focused on expanding the high-grade gold resource at the Tartan Mine in Manitoba. The company also holds exploration properties in Ontario and Quebec near major Canadian gold mines and projects. It is 32% owned by Robert McEwen, founder of Goldcorp and CEO of McEwen Mining.

data.title: CIBOX Secures 750,000 Euro Financing for Industrial Expansion
data.description:
Cibox Inter@ctive SA ( (FR:ALCBX) ) has issued an update.

CIBOX has secured financing of 750,000 euros through convertible bonds from a concert shareholder, supporting its new development cycle. This financial backing coincides with CIBOX’s move to its final production site in Revin, with an initial capacity of 200 electric bicycles per day, marking a significant step in its industrial expansion and commitment to local manufacturing.

More about Cibox Inter@ctive SA

CIBOX is a French company specializing in electric micro-mobility, focusing on the production of electric-assisted bicycles. The company has established its industrial operations in Revin, France, to produce competitive and innovative mobility products tailored to the European market.

data.title: EMX Royalty Announces New Copper-Gold Discovery in Serbia
data.description:
The latest update is out from EMX Royalty ( (TSE:EMX) ).

On March 27, 2025, EMX Royalty Corporation announced a significant update from its royalty partner, Zijin Mining, regarding a new copper and gold discovery in Serbia. Zijin’s 2024 annual report revealed an increase in copper and gold resources at the Cukaru Peki site and a new discovery at the Malka Golaja Copper-Gold Deposit. This discovery is significant for EMX as it holds a royalty interest in the area, indicating potential future revenue streams. The Malka Golaja deposit, covered by EMX’s Brestovac royalty interest, remains open for further exploration, suggesting promising opportunities for both Zijin and EMX.

More about EMX Royalty

EMX Royalty Corporation is a company that specializes in precious and base metals royalties. The company provides its investors with opportunities in discovery, development, and commodity price optionality while minimizing exposure to the risks associated with operating companies. EMX’s common shares are listed on the NYSE American Exchange and TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol ‘EMX’.

Average Trading Volume: 363,899

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $221.7M
